title: メソッドを保って成績ラベルを作る

input.factory: () => ({ formatter: { prefix: "A", bonus: 3, passLine: 10, makeLabel(record) { const total = record.score + this.bonus; let status = "NG"; if (total >= this.passLine) { status = "OK"; } return this.prefix + ":" + record.name + ":" + total + ":" + status; } }, records: [{ name: "mika", score: 4 }, { name: "ren", score: 8 }, { name: "ao", score: 7 }] })

cases.name: 合格ラインちょうどをOKにする

input.factory: () => ({ formatter: { prefix: "B", bonus: 0, passLine: 5, makeLabel(record) { const total = record.score + this.bonus; let status = "NG"; if (total >= this.passLine) { status = "OK"; } return this.prefix + ":" + record.name + ":" + total + ":" + status; } }, records: [{ name: "sora", score: 5 }, { name: "nagi", score: 4 }] })

cases.name: 補正値と接頭辞が異なるケース

input.factory: () => ({ formatter: { prefix: "Z", bonus: 12, passLine: 20, makeLabel(record) { const total = record.score + this.bonus; let status = "NG"; if (total >= this.passLine) { status = "OK"; } return this.prefix + ":" + record.name + ":" + total + ":" + status; } }, records: [{ name: "kei", score: 7 }, { name: "yu", score: 8 }, { name: "rio", score: 0 }] })

() => ({ formatter: { prefix: "E", bonus: 5, passLine: 8, makeLabel(record) { const total = record.score + this.bonus; let status = "NG"; if (total >= this.passLine) { status = "OK"; } return this.prefix + ":" + record.name + ":" + total + ":" + status; } }, records: [] })
